name: diagGetP6Extended, diagGetP6Timeout, diagSetP6Timeouts
title: diagGetP6Extended, diagGetP6Timeout, diagSetP6Timeouts
description: Returns or sets the time P6 and P6ex (in milliseconds) from the given source.
If an ECU qualifier is given, the build-in communications channel for this target is accessed.

When a Diagnostics over IP target is active, the P2 timeouts cannot be used because a TCP/IP connection does not provide end of transmission and start of reception events. Therefore the P2 functionality cannot be implemented and the overall timeout P6 has been defined.

parameters.description: Currently active value, i.e. the value originally set or last set from CAPL
Value stored at the selected interface in the description's document
Value configured in the configuration dialog for the description
